Concept One

Build Your Own Bowl

Pick your ingredients, choose your heat, and let the Sichuan broth do the heavy lifting.

Concept Two

Bistro Bites

Mapo tofu, mala fries, tiger prawns and more — the plates that turn a bowl into a feast.

How to Order

Three steps to a very good bowl

No fuss, no confusion — just point, pick, and eat.

1

Grab a bowl

Take a basket and fill it with everything you want — noodles, meat, seafood, veg, tofu.

2

Pick your heat

Mild, medium, or proper mala. We weigh it, cook it, and bring it to you.

3

Add bistro bites

Round it out with mapo tofu, mala fries or tiger prawns from the bistro menu.

Build Your Own Bowl

Your bowl, your rules

Over 40 ingredients at the counter — from enoki and lotus root to prawns, beef and handmade meatballs. Choose soup or dry, then tell us how much heat you can handle.

EnokiLotus rootBeef slices Tiger prawnFu chukMeatballs BroccoliInstant noodles 🌶 Mild🌶🌶 Medium🌶🌶🌶 Proper Mala
The Menu

Bowls & bistro bites

Everything is halal-friendly — no pork, no lard, ever.
